message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 15
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #ffffe6
skinparam NoteBorderColor #b3b3b3

participant "User Agent" as UA

box "Wallet" #e6e6e6
  participant "Frontend" as WF
  participant "Backend" as WB
end box

box "Issuer" #e6e6e6
  participant "Metadata" as IM
  participant "Web Site" as IWS
  participant "Token Endpoint" as ITE
  participant "Credential Endpoint" as ICE
end box

UA -> IWS : get credential

note over UA, IM
prepare credential issuance
end note

UA <- IWS : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)
UA -> WF : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

WF -> WF : gen DPoP key
WF -> WF : gen DPoP proof for issuer token endpoint
WF -> WB : get nonce (for app attestation)
WB --> WF : nonce
WF -> WF : obtain app attestation (nonce)
WF -> WB : get assertion for code exchange\n(hash(pre-authz-code), app attestation)

WB -> WB : check app_attestation
WB -> WB : generate assertion\n(iss=wallet backend, pre_authz_code_hash, client_id)
WB --> WF : assertion

WF -> IM : get issuer metadata
WF -> ITE : token request\n(pre-authz-code, pin, client_id, assertion, dpop_proof)

note over WF, ITE
wallet authenticates with issuer as OAuth Client using the assertion issued by its backend (RFC 7523)\nissuer checks wallet backend id and key against trust registry
end note

note over WF, ITE
Token Endpoint validates pre-authorized code and creates corresponding access token
end note

ITE --> WF : token response\n(access_token, c_nonce)

WF -> WF : gen key : key, key_attestation
WF -> WF : create proof of possesion (c_nonce)
WF -> WF : create DPoP proof for issuance request
WF -> ICE : issue credential\n(access_token, credential_type, format, proof, key_policy, dpop_proof)

note over WF, ICE
Credential Endpoint Token checks whether the access token is good for requested credential type and\nwhether the proof of possession is valid
end note

ICE --> WF : credential response (credential, format)

@enduml
```
